title: Rubber Jar Opener Gripper Pad Set Gadgets 4pcs Round Multi Function Can Silicone Easy Opening Bottle Lid Heat Insulated Non Slip for Seniors Arthritis Weak Hands Kitchen Coasters Tool
description:
About this item
Features: The specially designed circular jar opener pad with textured surface ensures a secure hold, making it effortless to open stubborn jars, bottles, and lids. Perfect for individuals with weak hands, arthritis, or mobility limitations who struggle with opening containers.
Material: Crafted from premium rubber material, these jar openers are durable and long-lasting. The non-slip and heat-insulating properties of the rubber material make it easy to use and maintain for repeated reliable use.
Size and color: The silicone jar opener measures 4.92 inches / 12.5cm in diameter, making it versatile for different sizes of jars, bottle caps, and lids. Comes in a pack of 4 colors: light pink, pink, light green, and blue.
Wide Application: Ideal for individuals with limited hand strength, these bottle opener offer effortless lid-opening and versatile uses as cup mats, heat-resistant shields, and heat insulation coasters. Suitable for users of all ages, they provide independence and convenience for daily tasks.
Packaging / Note: Includes 4 pieces of grippers for opening jars in attractive contemporary color options, adding a modern touch to your kitchen.
reviews_5s: I like these grippers they are amazing for seniors and arthritic hands. Glad I ordered them. The size is perfect and very durable.❤️❤️❤️. Every senior should have them.It's always nice to have some of these in the kitchen when you have jars that are hard to open from time to time. These work great and since they come in a 4-pack I just leave them in areas where I know I may have a hard time opening some cans or foods.silicone grippers. I use these in the kitchen for jars and have even used them in the shower to protect the shower parts when using a wrench and I needed a better grip. Protect your hands if something is hot, or use it to protect the counter/table from hot baking dishes.
